@@ -1334,7 +1334,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10","title":"FrankenTerm Remote: bidirectional protocol + PTY/websocket bridge","description":"Why
- Replacing xterm.js means we must support the full bidirectional terminal contract:
  - output parsing (VT/ANSI)
  - input encoding (keyboard/mouse -> bytes)
  - terminal replies to application queries (DSR/DA/DEC)
  - transport to a real PTY (local or remote)

Scope
- A minimal but correct PTY bridge (Rust) that can run locally and in production contexts.
- A secure websocket protocol for browser <-> PTY.
- End-to-end demos: connect FrankenTerm.WASM to a real shell and run scripted sessions.

Non-Negotiables
- Deterministic trace logging (JSONL) for every E2E session.
- Security: origin restrictions, explicit allowlists, no arbitrary command execution in prod.

Success Criteria
- Browser terminal can connect to a PTY bridge, run commands, and render accurately.
- Golden transcript tests prevent regressions.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:11:38.021410960Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:11:38.021410960Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:11:38.021410960Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10.1","title":"Spec: FrankenTerm websocket protocol + threat model","description":"Goal
- Define the browser <-> PTY transport protocol and a production-safe threat model.

Must Cover
- Message types
  - input bytes / semantic events
  - resize
  - output chunks
  - terminal replies (DSR/DA/DEC)
  - clipboard (optional)
  - keepalive
- Versioning + schema
  - protocol version negotiation
  - JSON Schema / binary schema (explicit)
- Backpressure + flow control (prevent OOM)
  - bounded queues
  - coalescing policies (resize storms, mouse move floods)
  - fairness: interactive input must not be starved by output
- Security model
  - origin restrictions, auth, rate limits
  - allowed commands (if any), sandboxing
  - no implicit file access
  - explicit threat model + mitigations
- Capability identity
  - TERM/capability profile story for remote PTY sessions (ties to terminfo bead)
- Logging
  - every session emits JSONL with run_id/session_id, git_sha/build_id, sizes, wire counters, latency histograms

Acceptance Criteria
- Protocol is versioned and has a schema.
- E2E scripts can generate deterministic transcripts for golden checks.
- Threat model includes an explicit loss matrix (false allow vs false block) and a documented decision policy.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CobaltDog","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:06.729410386Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:54:49.528985806Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:54:49.528951862Z","close_reason":"Protocol spec complete: 761-line document covering message types, flow control, security, logging","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:06.729410386Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10.2","title":"Implement: browser input encoder (DOM events -> terminal byte stream)","description":"Goal
- Encode browser keyboard/mouse events into a VT-compatible input byte stream suitable for a remote PTY.

Scope
- Key encoding: arrows, function keys, modifiers, paste, and common shortcuts.
- Mouse reporting sequences when enabled (SGR mouse).
- Respect feature toggles (bracketed paste, focus events, kitty keyboard where applicable).

Testing
- Unit tests for key/mouse mapping tables.
- Property tests for modifier state machines (no stuck mods).
- JSONL logs for E2E sessions include encoded byte lengths and event counts.
","notes":"Implemented VT-compatible browser input encoder in frankenterm-web. Added VtInputEncoderFeatures toggles (sgr_mouse, bracketed_paste, focus_events, kitty_keyboard) and encode_vt_input_event() pipeline covering key/mouse/wheel/focus/composition-commit events. Added legacy xterm key encoding (arrows/function keys/modifiers/common ctrl shortcuts), Kitty keyboard encoding with press/repeat/release kinds, SGR mouse + wheel encoding, bracketed paste helper for committed composition text, and feature-gated focus/mouse behavior. Wired wasm ingestion to queue encoded VT byte chunks and exposed drainEncodedInputBytes() for remote PTY forwarding; init options now parse encoder toggles. Added encoder unit tests for key mappings, modifier forms, mouse/focus gating, composition commit paste wrapping, and kitty release encoding. Validation: cargo test -p frankenterm-web (pass, including new tests), cargo check -p frankenterm-web --all-targets (pass), cargo clippy -p frankenterm-web --all-targets -- -D warnings (pass), cargo check --all-targets (workspace pass), cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings (workspace pass), cargo fmt --check (workspace pass). Note: cargo check -p frankenterm-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown currently fails in pre-existing renderer API drift (wgpu surface/request_device signatures), outside this bead scope.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrightDune","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:07.021846135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:30:58.206597545Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:30:58.206577637Z","close_reason":"Completed: VT input encoder + tests + wasm byte-drain wiring","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:07.021846135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:07.021846135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:07.021846135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.10.3","title":"Implement: terminal reply engine (DSR/DA/DEC queries)","description":"Goal
- Support the bidirectional terminal contract by answering application queries (e.g. cursor position, device attributes).

Scope
- Identify and implement the minimal required set of queries for common CLI apps.
- Replies must be deterministic and capability-profiled.

Testing
- Conformance fixtures: query -> expected reply bytes.
- Differential tests against reference terminals where possible.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10.4","title":"Implement: PTY bridge server (Rust) with websocket transport","description":"Goal
- Implement a Rust service that spawns a PTY and bridges I/O over websockets to FrankenTerm.WASM.

Scope
- Use portable-pty (already in tree) or a better alternative if justified.
- Enforce security constraints from the threat model.
- Expose structured telemetry: bytes in/out, latency, resize counts, exit status.

Acceptance Criteria
- Can run locally and drive interactive shells.
- Produces JSONL logs conforming to the shared schema.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10.5","title":"E2E: scripted remote terminal sessions + golden transcripts","description":"Goal
- Add end-to-end scripts that connect the browser FrankenTerm to the PTY bridge and run deterministic scripted sessions.

Requirements
- Scripts must emit detailed JSONL (run_id, git_sha, sizes, wire counters, checksums).
- Golden transcripts are checksum-gated; failures produce actionable diffs.

Acceptance Criteria
- At least 5 high-signal scripts: resize storm, paste, unicode, OSC8 links, and long scrollback.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.10.6","title":"Perf: keystroke-to-photon latency budget + measurement harness","description":"Goal
- Define and enforce latency budgets for interactive remote sessions.

Metrics
- Keystroke -> rendered frame (p50/p95/p99).
- Round-trip websocket latency and jitter.
- Output throughput under load.

Acceptance Criteria
- Harness outputs machine-readable JSON and is gated against regressions.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","title":"Implement: new crate frankenterm-web (wasm-bindgen API + build plumbing)","description":"Goal
- Add `crates/frankenterm-web` with WASM bindings and a minimal JS-facing API.

Requirements
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]`.
- Expose: init(canvas_id or handle), resize, feed_input, present_patch.

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown` succeeds.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","title":"Optional: auto URL detection (non-OSC8) + safe click handling","description":"Goal
- Detect plain-text URLs in the viewport/scrollback and make them clickable (similar to xterm.js WebLinks addon).

Scope
- Heuristics tuned to avoid false positives in code.
- Security: sanitize and enforce allowed protocols.

Testing
- Fixture corpus for common URL forms.
- E2E: click opens expected target (or emits link event) with JSONL logs.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","title":"Implement: WebGPU renderer skeleton (device init + background cell quads)","description":"Goal
- Get pixels on screen: render the terminal background + cell backgrounds at interactive speeds.

Requirements
- WebGPU init (adapter/device/queue) + resize handling.
- Draw pass for background and per-cell bg colors.
- Path for applying dirty-span patches only (no full redraw required).

Acceptance Criteria
- A minimal web harness can render a synthetic grid and resize without artifacts.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseStream","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908139015Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908120100Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1012,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WebGPU renderer skeleton complete (4fff96e9). Text rendering deferred to bd-lff4p.2.5.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:55Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","title":"Implement: glyph rasterization + atlas cache (monospace first)","description":"Goal
- Turn glyphs into atlas textures with stable metrics and minimal overhead.

Requirements
- Start with monospace ASCII + box drawing + common symbols; expand to full Unicode coverage via bd-lff4p.2.18.
- Deterministic glyph keys/ids across runs and platforms (within a given font build).
- Cache with explicit eviction policy + metrics (hit/miss, bytes, upload cost).
- Hot path: no allocations when glyph already cached.

Testing
- Unit tests for key stability and eviction invariants.
- Golden fixtures for a representative glyph set (metrics + atlas coordinates).
- Bench harness integration to measure cache miss cost and steady-state throughput.

Acceptance Criteria
- Benchable API: given a glyph key, returns atlas coords and advances with no allocations in hot path.
- Upload + packing strategy is measurable and regression-gated.
","notes":"2026-02-09 AmberMountain: starting work; focusing on glyph atlas cache API correctness + eviction/metrics invariants + benches/tests; coordinating via Agent Mail.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T02:08:44.022964319Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1034,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WindyDeer support slice (2026-02-09): added atlas-cache invariant tests in crates/frankenterm-web/src/glyph_atlas.rs: (1) lru_touch_keeps_recent_entry_hot, (2) bytes_uploaded_changes_only_on_miss, (3) cached_bytes_never_exceeds_budget. Validation run: cargo fmt --check, cargo check -p frankenterm-web --all-targets, cargo clippy -p frankenterm-web --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test -p frankenterm-web glyph_atlas (10 tests passed). Note: workspace-wide clippy currently fails on unrelated clippy::type-complexity in crates/frankenterm-core/benches/parser_patch_bench.rs, and that file is under another agent's exclusive reservation.","created_at":"2026-02-09T02:08:44Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","title":"Implement: glyph rasterization + atlas cache (monospace first)","description":"Goal
- Turn glyphs into atlas textures with stable metrics and minimal overhead.

Requirements
- Start with monospace ASCII + box drawing + common symbols; expand to full Unicode coverage via bd-lff4p.2.18.
- Deterministic glyph keys/ids across runs and platforms (within a given font build).
- Cache with explicit eviction policy + metrics (hit/miss, bytes, upload cost).
- Hot path: no allocations when glyph already cached.

Testing
- Unit tests for key stability and eviction invariants.
- Golden fixtures for a representative glyph set (metrics + atlas coordinates).
- Bench harness integration to measure cache miss cost and steady-state throughput.

Acceptance Criteria
- Benchable API: given a glyph key, returns atlas coords and advances with no allocations in hot path.
- Upload + packing strategy is measurable and regression-gated.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","title":"Implement: WebGPU text rendering (atlas + instanced quads)","description":"Goal
- Render terminal text cells using the glyph atlas and an instanced quad pipeline.

Requirements
- Respect per-cell fg color + attrs (bold/italic/underline as feasible).
- Handle wide glyphs and combining marks (at least gracefully).

Acceptance Criteria
- 120x40 grid @ 60fps with typical demo workloads on modern desktop.
- Instrumented frame timing (CPU submit + GPU time if possible).
","notes":"2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: wired true glyph-atlas texture sampling path in frankenterm-web renderer. Added atlas texture/sampler + glyph metadata storage buffer bindings in WGSL/pipeline; patch application now resolves glyph ids into atlas slots and uploads atlas/metadata on demand; renderer now samples atlas alpha per cell for fg ink (with underline/strikethrough attrs). Added public atlas pixel exposure in glyph_atlas for GPU upload bridge. Current glyph raster source is deterministic procedural fallback; awaiting bd-lff4p.2.4 final raster/metadata contract to swap in production font rasterization.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: follow-up polish: batch atlas upload once per apply_patches (avoid N× full-atlas uploads when many new glyphs appear in one frame), treat whitespace as glyph_id=0 (no atlas slot), and key glyph slot mapping by GlyphKey (codepoint+px_size) with redundant glyph_meta writes avoided via CPU-side equality check.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: round cell pixel sizes in WebGpuRenderer init/resize so viewport+cell metrics stay aligned on fractional DPR (avoids subtle drift/stretched quads under zoom).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IndigoRaven","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T22:55:43.051613842Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.6","title":"Implement: cursor + selection + hyperlink hover/click rendering","description":"Goal
- Make the terminal feel interactive: cursor, selection visualization, and hyperlink affordances.

Requirements
- Cursor rendering styles: block, bar, underline.
- Selection rendering + copy.
- Hyperlink hover underline + click dispatch.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic visual tests (golden images or checksumable framebuffer dumps).

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","title":"Implement: web input capture layer (keyboard/mouse/touch)","description":"Goal
- Capture browser input events and feed them into the ftui/FrankenTerm world with minimal latency and deterministic semantics.

Requirements
- Keyboard
  - consistent modifier semantics across browsers/OS
  - repeat handling
  - special keys and function keys
  - composition events integrate with IME plan (bd-lff4p.2.9)
- Mouse
  - click/drag/wheel with correct cell coordinates (respects DPR + font metrics)
  - selection gestures
- Touch
  - tap, long-press, scroll; optional pinch zoom

Testing + Logging
- Unit tests for key mapping tables and edge cases (Ctrl/Alt/Meta/Super).
- Property tests for modifier state machines (no stuck modifiers; idempotent focus loss).
- E2E scripts emit JSONL: event counts, encoded bytes (when relevant), and any mapping fallbacks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic event encoding suitable for record/replay.
- No key ghosting; no stuck modifiers; focus changes handled correctly.
","notes":"NavyCanyon is actively implementing frankenterm-web input schema/module + tests; asked others to avoid overlapping edits in crates/frankenterm-web until push (see Agent Mail thread bd-lff4p.2.7).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271201447Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271180678Z","close_reason":"Implemented input schema + wasm glue (key/mouse/wheel/touch/composition/focus) with stable JSON encoding + tests; wasm32 check passes","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
